name: Lapin En Gibelotte
recipeIngredient: 1 Bouquet garni (parsley, thyme, and bay leaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté the bacon in a casserole until rendered fat.
2. Add the rabbit pieces to the casserole and sauté until browned.
3. Season the rabbit with salt and pepper.
4. Sprinkle the flour evenly over the rabbit pieces and toss well.
5. Add the chicken stock, white wine, minced garlic, bouquet garni, tomato paste, salt, and pepper to the casserole.
6. Simmer, covered, over low heat for 1 1/2 hours or in a preheated oven at 325°F until tender.
7. Remove the rabbit pieces from the casserole and strain the sauce through a fine-mesh sieve into a saucepan.
8. Skim off any fat from the surface of the sauce.
9. Reduce the sauce to a desired consistency and add the heavy cream.
10. Return the strained rabbit pieces to the sauce and serve.
